name: Melon with Prawns and Strawberries
recipeIngredient: 1 Medium-size, ripe seasonal melon (e.g., ogen, cantaloupe or honeydew)
8 oz Cooked, peeled prawns (thawed if frozen)
2 Little Gem lettuces, rinsed and torn into pieces
Salt and freshly ground black pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and chop the avocado and place it in a mixing bowl. Sprinkle with lemon juice to prevent discoloration.
2. Halve the melon, discard seeds and scoop out flesh using a melon baller (or cut into cubes).
3. Gently combine the melon, chopped celery, strawberries and prawns with the avocado. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
4. Meanwhile, puree dressing ingredients in a food processor or liquidizer.
5. Arrange lettuce on 4 plates and divide prawn mixture between them. Pour dressing over and serve immediately.
Preparation time: 20 minutes
Freezing: Not recommended
